ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "blurb" TEXT /* Short description or blurb of the campaign */,
  "blurb_length" INTEGER /* Length of the blurb in characters */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the campaign */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-category of the campaign */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the campaign is launched */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the campaign was created */,
  "launched_at" TEXT /* Date and time the campaign was launched */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Date and time the campaign deadline */,
  "goal" REAL /* Goal amount for the campaign */,
  "pledged" REAL /* Total amount pledged to the campaign */,
  "usd_pledged" REAL /* Total amount pledged to the campaign in USD */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers for the campaign */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Indicates if the campaign is a staff pick */,
  "state" TEXT /* Final state of the campaign (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creator of the campaign */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the campaign's goal and pledged amounts are denominated */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the campaign was updated */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the main campaign video */,
  "featured_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the main campaign image */,
  "story" TEXT /* Detailed story or narrative of the campaign */,
  "faqs" TEXT /* Frequently asked questions about the campaign */,
  "rewards" TEXT /* Information about the rewards offered to backers */,
  "is_live" INTEGER /* Indicates if the campaign is currently live */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the campaign is archived */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the campaign has received */,
  "shares_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the campaign has been shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES creators ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category icon */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the category was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the sub-category belongs to */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the sub-category icon */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sub-category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sub-category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the sub-category was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "displayable_name" TEXT /* Displayable name of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL of the country's flag */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the country is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the country was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the country was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creator */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the creator */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the creator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the creator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the creator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the creator */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the creator */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the creator */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the creator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the creator */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the creator's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the creator */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the creator's social media profiles */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the creator is verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the creator account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the creator account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_creators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the backer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the backer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the backer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the backer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the backer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the backer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the backer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the backer */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the backer */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the backer's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the backer */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the backer's social media profiles */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the backer is verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the backer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the backer account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_backers" (
  "campaign_backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign-backer relationship */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer */,
  "pledged_amount" REAL /* Amount pledged by the backer */,
  "usd_pledged_amount" REAL /* Amount pledged by the backer in USD */,
  "backed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the backer pledged to the campaign */,
  "reward_tier" TEXT /* Reward tier the backer selected */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the rewards */,
  "is_refunded" INTEGER /* Indicates if the pledge has been refunded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the backer pledged */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the pledge was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_backers_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_backers_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the update was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the update was updated */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image associated with the update */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of a video associated with the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_updates_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the comment was updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been flagged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_comments_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, creator, backer) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., campaign update, pledge confirmation) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the notification was updated */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was read */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the image was uploaded */,
  "is_main" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image is the main image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the image was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_images_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "video_path" TEXT /* File path to the video */,
  "video_size" REAL /* Size of the video in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the video was uploaded */,
  "is_main" INTEGER /* Indicates if the video is the main video */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the video was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the video was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_videos_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
